title: Omni Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Omni Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Omni Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Omni Logistics India:
Omni Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omni Logistics India!
